channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Yobe State Police Arrest Drug Trafficker and Kidnapping Kingpin
item.description: Yobe State Police Command has arrested a suspected drug baron and kidnapping kingpin as part of their crackdown on drug trafficking and violent crimes. In a raid on 17 July 2026, officers from Yindisk...

item.title: New York City Mayor Considers Arresting Israeli Prime Minister Over ICC Warrant
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has sparked controversy by considering the arrest of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, a key ally of former President Donald Trump, amid allegations of war ...

item.title: Argentina's Logistical Complaints Ahead of World Cup 2026 Final Against Spain
item.description: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni has raised concerns with FIFA regarding the logistical arrangements for the 2026 World Cup final against Spain, claiming his team faced an unfair advantage. The match, s...

item.title: Spain and Argentina set for 2026 World Cup final in dramatic clash
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup final will feature a historic showdown between Spain and Argentina, with Lionel Messi potentially playing his final World Cup match. Argentina's emotional journey to the final ...

item.title: Man with Facial Injury Treated by Paramedics at Ottawa's ByWard Market
item.description: Paramedics were dispatched to the ByWard Market in Ottawa following reports of a man suffering a facial laceration. The incident, which occurred on July 18, 2026, involved emergency responders arrivin...

item.title: Philippines Condemns Racist Chinese Video Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys
item.description: A state-sponsored Chinese media outlet's AI-generated video portraying Filipinos as monkeys under US and Japanese control has sparked strong condemnation from Philippine officials. Defense Secretary G...

item.title: France and England Clash in World Cup Third-Place Play-Off: Dramatic Comeback and Tensions
item.description: The World Cup third-place play-off between France and England at Hard Rock Stadium in Miami was a rollercoaster of emotions, marked by an initial 4-0 lead for England followed by a stunning French com...

item.title: Tanzania High Court Upholds 30-Year Rape Sentence Despite Appeal
item.description: The Tanzania High Court has dismissed an appeal by Komanya Makoye, a man serving a 30-year jail term for rape, ruling that the trial record clearly showed he understood all proceedings in Kiswahili. J...

item.title: Massive Volcanic Eruption Reshaped Oceanic Plate, Study Reveals
item.description: A groundbreaking study published in *Geophysical Research Letters* reveals that Earth’s largest volcanic event, linked to the formation of the Ontong Java Plateau, dramatically altered an entire ocean...

item.title: Yassi Pressman and BF Luigi Villafuerte Announce Engagement
item.description: Yassi Pressman, a well-known personality in the Philippine entertainment industry, and her boyfriend Luigi Villafuerte have officially announced their engagement. The couple, who have been in the publ...

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani Surprises Audience at Djo’s Forest Hills Show
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani made an unexpected video appearance during Djo’s headline performance at the sold-out Forest Hills Stadium on July 17, 2026. The mayor replaced Charlie Heaton’s usua...

item.title: Man injured in Sydney stabbing incident
item.description: A man has been seriously injured in a stabbing incident at a unit in Sydney's eastern suburbs. The attack, which occurred on July 19, 2026, left the victim with wounds to the face and hands. Emergency...

item.title: Appalachian Trail Hiker Nears the 100-Mile Wilderness After Crossing the Bigelows and Central Maine
item.description: This trail journal documents several days of an Appalachian Trail thru-hike as the author, Patrick M (trail name “Acorn”), approaches Maine’s famous 100-Mile Wilderness. Between July 14 and July 17, 2...

item.title: NGT Directs Closure of Chromium-Contaminated Wells in Odisha’s Sukinda
item.description: The National Green Tribunal (NGT) has directed the Odisha government to permanently seal contaminated wells in the chromite-rich Sukinda valley due to hexavalent chromium pollution. A study by the Cen...

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford Criticizes U.S. Politicians Over Wildfire Response and Evacuations
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford has criticized U.S. politicians for their comments on Canada's wildfire management, calling their criticism 'a very short memory.' During a news conference in Thunder Bay, Fo...

item.title: Kenya addresses cybersecurity incident with enhanced protocols
item.description: Kenya's Ministry of Information, Communications, and Digital Economy has confirmed it is investigating a cybersecurity incident that impacted the official website of the president. The incident was de...

item.title: ADC Demands Tinubu Resign Over Failed Economic Policies
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has strongly criticized President Bola Tinubu for persisting with economic policies that have worsened poverty and hunger in Nigeria. In a statement, the oppositi...

item.title: Blue Jays celebrate 1992-1993 World Series legacy with Joe Carter statue unveiling
item.description: A statue commemorating the 1992 and 1993 World Series championship Toronto Blue Jays has been unveiled outside Rogers Centre, capturing Joe Carter mid-jump after his iconic walk-off home run in the 19...

item.title: England Takes Command in World Cup Third-Place Match Against France
item.description: In a dramatic third-place match at the FIFA World Cup, England surged ahead of France with a 4-2 halftime lead, stunning Les Bleus despite Kylian Mbappé's presence in the squad. The French team, which...

item.title: PHLPost Revives Handwritten Letters in Modern Era
item.description: The article discusses how PHLPost, a news platform under ABS-CBN, is reviving the tradition of handwritten letters as a meaningful communication method in the digital age. Francis Orcio, a journalist ...
